title: The Impact of the Addis Ababa Greenery Project on Sidewalk Clearances and Building Access for Furniture Movers
excerpt: Addis Ababa Greenery Project: sidewalk clearances, building access furniture movers, tree pits bollards, urban greening moving logistics 2026.
content:
The impact of the Addis Ababa Greenery Project on sidewalk clearances and building access for furniture movers

Greenery Project transforms sidewalks—tree pits, planters, bollards, and narrowed effective width that blocks sofa horizontal carry once fit fine. Furniture movers lose inches that matter; dollies cannot straight-line gate to truck. Impact assessment before move day prevents hoist surprise and sidewalk damage fines to new plantings.

This guide addresses Greenery Project sidewalk changes for furniture moving access.

Physical changes affecting moves

  • Wider tree pits encroach former carry path.
  • Raised planters block direct building-to-curb line.
  • Bollards prevent truck backup to door—distance added.
  • New lawn edges soft—no dolly shortcut across mud.
  • Irrigation lines shallow—stake damage risk.

Pre-move path survey

Walk carry path with furniture dimensions taped—queen mattress diagonal test. Photograph obstacles for quote shuttle discussion. Management may allow temporary planter protection plywood—ask don't assume.

Protection of new greenery

No trunk scrape young trees; no soil compaction repeated passes—plywood track if crossing unavoidable with permission. Broken sapling billed to negligent mover—prevention mandatory.

Disassembly and vertical strategy

Sidewalk loss may force mattress tilt or furniture module split—crew skill not force. Balcony hoist if interior path fails post-greening.

Coordination with city and compound

Official projects sometimes grant temporary access permits for move hour—apply early. Compound internal route may bypass public sidewalk—prefer when available.

Active Movers greenery-aware survey

2026 survey form includes sidewalk width post-project—quote carry or hoist accordingly.

Conclusion

Greenery Project narrows mover geometry—survey new clearances, protect plantings, disassemble willingly, and permit when possible—green city and moved furniture both survive careful planning.
author: Active Movers Team
